sentences.target: Mon loisir préféré, c'est le jardinage.

translations.fr: Mon loisir préféré, c'est le jardinage.
translations.es: Mi pasatiempo favorito es la jardinería.
translations.de: Mein liebstes Hobby ist das Gärtnern.
translations.it: Il mio passatempo preferito è il giardinaggio.
translations.ko: 제가 가장 좋아하는 취미는 정원 가꾸기입니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我最喜欢的爱好是园艺。
translations.yue: 我最鍾意嘅嗜好係園藝。
translations.pt: Meu passatempo favorito é a jardinagem.
translations.vi: Sở thích yêu thích nhất của tôi là làm vườn.
translations.el: Το αγαπημένο μου χόμπι είναι η κηπουρική.
translations.ja: 私の一番好きな趣味は園芸です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, masculine singular, modifies 'loisir' to mark possession by the speaker.
Common noun, head of the topicalized noun phrase setting the topic of the sentence.
Adjective (past participle used adjectivally), agrees in gender/number with 'loisir'.
Clitic pronoun 'ce' elided before vowel; subject pronoun in the copular construction, referring to the topicalized NP.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present, links subject 'c'' to the predicate nominal.
Definite article introducing the predicate noun 'jardinage' (generic reference).
Common noun serving as the predicate nominal after the copula.

sentences.target: Je parle de mon loisir aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: Je parle de mon loisir aujourd'hui.
translations.en: I'm talking about my hobby today.
translations.de: Heute spreche ich über mein Hobby.
translations.ru: Сегодня я говорю о своём хобби.
translations.pt: Hoje eu falo sobre o meu hobby.
translations.he: היום אני מדבר על התחביב שלי.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi nói về sở thích của mình.
translations.nl: Vandaag praat ik over mijn hobby.
translations.uk: Сьогодні я розповідаю про своє хобі.
translations.hi: आज मैं अपने शौक के बारे में बात कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Σήμερα μιλάω για το χόμπι μου.
translations.nb: I dag snakker jeg om hobbyen min.
translations.id: Hari ini saya berbicara tentang hobi saya.
translations.sv: Idag pratar jag om min hobby.
translations.da: I dag taler jeg om min hobby.
translations.ja: 今日は私の趣味について話します。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular.
Preposition introducing the oblique complement 'mon loisir'.
Possessive determiner, masculine singular, modifies 'loisir'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'de'.
Temporal adverb specifying when the speaking occurs.

sentences.target: Il pratique un loisir chaque week-end.

translations.fr: Il pratique un loisir chaque week-end.
translations.en: He does a hobby every weekend.
translations.es: Cada fin de semana practica un pasatiempo.
translations.de: Jedes Wochenende geht er seinem Hobby nach.
translations.it: Ogni fine settimana si dedica a un passatempo.
translations.ko: 그는 매주 주말마다 취미 생활을 합니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他每个周末都会做自己的爱好。
translations.yue: 佢每個週末都會參與自己嘅興趣活動。
translations.ru: Каждые выходные он занимается своим хобби.
translations.pt: Todo fim de semana ele se dedica a um hobby.
translations.he: כל סוף שבוע הוא עוסק בתחביב שלו.
translations.vi: Mỗi cuối tuần anh ấy dành thời gian cho sở thích của mình.
translations.ar: كل عطلة نهاية أسبوع يمارس هوايته.
translations.nl: Elk weekend houdt hij zich bezig met zijn hobby.
translations.hi: वह हर सप्ताहांत अपने शौक में समय बिताता है.
translations.pl: W każdy weekend zajmuje się swoim hobby.
translations.el: Κάθε Σαββατοκύριακο ασχολείται με το χόμπι του.
translations.nb: Hver helg driver han med hobbyen sin.
translations.id: Setiap akhir pekan dia menekuni hobinya.
translations.sv: Varje helg ägnar han sig åt sin hobby.
translations.ro: În fiecare weekend se ocupă de hobbyul lui.
translations.cs: Každý víkend se věnuje svému koníčku.
translations.da: Hver weekend dyrker han sin hobby.
translations.fi: Joka viikonloppu hän harrastaa omaa harrastustaan.
translations.ja: 彼は毎週末趣味をしています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Indefinite article, singular, introduces 'loisir'.
Common noun; direct object of 'pratique'.
Invariable distributive determiner modifying the time noun 'week-end'.
Common noun forming a temporal NP with 'chaque'; functions as an adverbial of frequency/time.

sentences.target: Nous partageons ce loisir en famille.

translations.fr: Nous partageons ce loisir en famille.
translations.en: We share this hobby as a family.
translations.de: Wir teilen dieses Hobby als Familie.
translations.ko: 우리는 이 취미를 가족끼리 함께 즐깁니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们一家人一起分享这个爱好。
translations.yue: 我哋一家人一齊分享呢個嗜好。
translations.ru: Мы всей семьёй разделяем это хобби.
translations.pt: Nós compartilhamos este hobby em família.
translations.he: אנחנו חולקים את התחביב הזה כמשפחה.
translations.vi: Gia đình chúng tôi cùng chia sẻ sở thích này.
translations.nl: Wij delen deze hobby als gezin.
translations.uk: Ми всією родиною поділяємо це хобі.
translations.hu: A család együtt űzi ezt a hobbit.
translations.hi: हम यह शौक परिवार के साथ साझा करते हैं.
translations.pl: Jako rodzina dzielimy się tym hobby.
translations.el: Μοιραζόμαστε αυτό το χόμπι ως οικογένεια.
translations.nb: Vi deler denne hobbyen som familie.
translations.id: Kami berbagi hobi ini sebagai keluarga.
translations.sv: Vi delar den här hobbyn som familj.
translations.da: Vi deler denne hobby som familie.
translations.ja: 私たちは家族でこの趣味を共有しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'loisir'.
Common noun; direct object of 'partageons'.
Preposition introducing the fixed expression 'en famille' indicating manner/circumstance.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'en' in the idiomatic phrase 'en famille'.

Il pratique un loisir chaque week-end.
Nous partageons ce loisir en famille.

Il pratique un loisir chaque week-end.
Nous partageons ce loisir en famille.
en: I'm talking about my hobby today.
He does a hobby every weekend.
We share this hobby as a family.
